From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Japanese thoroughbred horse racing award

The **JRA Award for Best Older Male Horse** ([Japanese](/wiki/Japanese_language "Japanese language"): JRA賞最優秀4歳以上牡馬, [Hepburn](/wiki/Hepburn_romanization "Hepburn romanization"): *Jei Āru Ei Shō Sai Yūshū Yonsai Ijō Boba*) is a title awarded annually by the [Japan Racing Association](/wiki/Japan_Racing_Association "Japan Racing Association") (JRA) to an outstanding horse of that category in [Thoroughbred horse racing](/wiki/Thoroughbred_horse_racing "Thoroughbred horse racing") in [Japan](/wiki/Japan "Japan"). Since 1987 the honor has been part of the [JRA Awards](/wiki/JRA_Award "JRA Award").

## Records

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=JRA_Award_for_Best_Older_Male_Horse&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Records")]

**Most successful horse (2 wins):**

* [Orfevre](/wiki/Orfevre "Orfevre") – *2012, 2013*
* [Kitasan Black](/wiki/Kitasan_Black "Kitasan Black") – *2016, 2017*
